entries.name: TonyMilkdrop - Da Vinci's Balloon
entries.author: TonyMilkdrop
entries.blurb: A Renaissance balloon drifting through a mechanical sky.
entries.technical_notes: A classic reaction-diffusion simulation generated via a per-pixel warp shader and heavy frame feedback in sampler_main. The high-contrast, biomorphic cellular structures expand and morph in response to the bass in the audio, while background noise textures are modulated by mid frequencies. A slow hue cycle rotates the background color washes from deep purples to vibrant greens.
entries.source_ref: TonyMilkdrop - Leonardo Da Vinci's Balloon [Flexi - merry-go-round + techstyle]

entries.name: Solar Wind
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: Charged plasma streaks racing past the camera in a coronal magnetic field, audio bass intensifying the eruption arcs.
entries.technical_notes: 65,536 plasma streaks race through a strongly stretched curl-noise field with a dominant horizontal current. Velocity stretching is set very high so each particle reads as a streak rather than a sprite. Bass amplifies vertical curl strongly, producing solar corona arcs erupting from the medium on every kick.

entries.name: Coral Garden
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A living reef of coral polyps gently swaying in current, deep ocean color, slow camera at the seafloor.
entries.technical_notes: A dense, undulating landscape of coral-like structures is generated using custom shapes and waves replicated through frame feedback. A low decay rate in sampler_main allows these colorful floral clusters to persist and accumulate into a continuous 3D terrain. The camera's sweeping flight path and the terrain's rippling motion are driven by per-pixel warp equations modulated by the music's bass and mid-frequency bands.

entries.name: Bee Swarm
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A swarm of golden honeybees moving as one organism, separation pushing them apart while alignment keeps the entire mass flying the same direction.
entries.technical_notes: A dense particle system of golden elements is instanced via custom waves to form a shifting 3D terrain. The height and displacement of this shimmering landscape are modulated by the bass and treble bands of the audio, causing waves of light to ripple across the field. Frame feedback through sampler_main with a controlled decay rate blends the individual points into a fluid, organic texture.

entries.name: Lava Flow
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A river of molten lava crawling slowly across the canvas, hot orange-red glowing through dark crust, bass triggering plumes of fire.
entries.technical_notes: A dense particle system of custom-textured organic pods flows along a wave-like trajectory. A dramatic beat-gated event at ~0:05 triggers a camera dive and a burst of larger, textured elements toward the screen, driven by bass-attenuated thresholds. The rendering utilizes custom texture sampling combined with a dark background decay, creating a visceral, fiery landscape of organic embers.

entries.name: Refik Rolling Ocean of Flora
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A 3D rolling ocean of botanical particles — flowers drift across a layered wave surface and erupt in solar-corona arcs on bass hits, viewed from sea level by a slowly orbiting camera.
entries.technical_notes: Thousands of detailed floral sprites are rendered using texture sampling, mapped onto an undulating 3D surface. The wave's amplitude and frequency are driven by the music's bass and mid bands, creating a rhythmic, organic landscape. Subtle frame feedback through sampler_main softens the edges of the moving sprites, blending them into a continuous tapestry.

entries.name: Murmuration
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: Thousands of starlings emergently flocking against a dusk sky, their swarm shape morphing on the music's pulse.
entries.technical_notes: A dense cellular particle system is projected onto a 3D plane, creating a bubbling, organic texture reminiscent of boiling mud or foam. High-frequency micro-vibrations are driven by a per-pixel warp shader, while bass transients trigger dramatic vertical eruptions via beat-gated bursts. The earthy copper palette is defined by procedural noise and subtle lighting calculations within the composite shader.

entries.name: Jellyfish Bloom
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A bioluminescent bloom of jellyfish drifting in deep ocean current, their soft pulsing glow synchronized to bass frequencies.
entries.technical_notes: A dense field of bioluminescent jellyfish sprites is instanced and modulated across a 3D landscape using custom shapes and texture sampling. Per-pixel warp equations create an undulating wave motion driven by the audio's bass frequencies, while feedback trails in sampler_main with low decay preserve the delicate, glowing tentacles. The cyan and violet palette shimmers in response to high-frequency transients.

entries.name: Schooling Fish
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A tight school of silver fish moving as one organism through a tropical reef, dappled light, slow camera orbit at depth.
entries.technical_notes: A dense field of crystalline particles is generated via custom wave equations, forming an undulating 3D terrain. Per-frame equations drive the vertical displacement and wave amplitude in response to the bass, while mid-range frequencies induce a high-frequency jitter across the individual shards. A subtle warp field keeps the particle grid fluidly drifting across the dark viewport.

entries.name: Bat Cave Emergence
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: Thousands of bats spiraling out of a cave at dusk, separation keeping them from collision, strong alignment driving the whole mass out into the open sky.
entries.technical_notes: An undulating landscape composed of thousands of leaf-like custom shapes is driven by the audio's bass frequencies, creating rolling hills. A low decay rate in the frame feedback loop (sampler_main) preserves the dense, textured structure of the shards. Mid and treble frequencies introduce subtle jitter and scattering among the individual particles.

entries.name: Embers Rising
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: Hot embers from a campfire spiraling upward through still night air, bursting into corona arcs on bass hits.
entries.technical_notes: A dense particle system of amber-hued elements is driven by a turbulent warp field that reacts dynamically to the audio. The bass drives the expansion and swirling turbulence of the particle cloud, while treble transients modulate the brightness and sparkle of individual elements. Persistent trails are maintained via a low decay rate in sampler_main, creating a fluid, organic ribbon of light.

entries.name: amandio c - new life
entries.author: amandio c
entries.technical_notes: An infinite zoom feedback loop through sampler_main creates a deep radial tunnel of organic, cellular structures. The per-pixel warp shader applies a complex sinusoidal distortion that makes the flagella-like tendrils wriggle in sync with the mids and treble of the audio. Dynamic scaling and brightness spikes are heavily gated by the bass, causing the golden core to burst outward on strong beats.

entries.name: Rovastar & Unchained - Ambrosia Mystic (Dark Heart Mix)
entries.author: Rovastar & Unchained
entries.technical_notes: Central custom waves react to high-frequency audio with rapid, electric oscillations, mirrored across a bilateral symmetry axis. Low-frequency beats trigger audio-gated color bursts of emerald green and gold, which diffuse outwards via a symmetric warp field. Moderate decay in sampler_main creates smoky, Rorschach-like feedback trails that dissolve into the dark background.

entries.name: Rovastar + Telek - Altars of Madness (Rolling Oceans Mix)
entries.author: Rovastar + Telek
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave draws a highly reactive, flickering white scribble driven by the treble and mid bands of the audio. The surrounding field uses a per-pixel warp shader to generate fluid, curly reaction-diffusion vortexes that slowly drift and dissolve. Low decay in the frame feedback loop through sampler_main preserves these organic, painterly waves, while bass hits trigger sudden transitions from deep teal to vibrant emerald green.

entries.name: Meteor Shower
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A Perseid-style meteor shower across the night sky, bright streaks crossing the canvas, the rare ones bursting bright.
entries.technical_notes: A dense, raymarched signed distance field (SDF) landscape utilizes domain repetition to create an infinite field of ribbed, metallic structures. The surface specular highlights are modulated by treble bands in the audio, causing tiny points of light to sparkle across the ridges. A subtle warp field combined with frame feedback through sampler_main creates a slow, undulating motion driven by the bass.

entries.name: Geiss - Thumb Drum
entries.author: Geiss
entries.blurb: Tight kick-driven thumps that radiate outward like sonar pings.
entries.technical_notes: A reaction-diffusion system generates organic Turing patterns resembling fingerprints or fluid currents. The per-pixel warp shader drives the swirling vortex motion, while feedback through sampler_main is sharpened in the composite pass to maintain high-contrast boundaries. High-frequency details shimmer in response to treble in the audio.

entries.name: Comet Field
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A field of comets streaking through deep space, bright nuclei pulled into elongated tails by velocity and trail decay.
entries.technical_notes: A complex per-pixel warp shader distorts the feedback buffer into a dense, self-replicating texture resembling metallic scales or liquid metal threads. Extremely low decay in sampler_main allows these structures to persist and accumulate into a rich, organic landscape. The audio's bass frequencies drive dramatic vertical surges and zoom modulations, causing the entire textured field to ripple dynamically.

entries.name: Mig_061
entries.technical_notes: Multiple horizontal custom waves are modulated by high-frequency treble, rendering as jittering lines. A low decay rate in the frame feedback loop (sampler_main) allows these waveforms to accumulate into dense, painterly ridges resembling folded fabric. A per-pixel warp shader drives a slow downward drift, while beat-gated transitions cycle the color palette through deep blues, greens, and purples.

entries.name: Cherry Blossom Storm
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A swirling current of cherry blossom petals carried on a slow spring wind, sky gradient overhead, camera drifting through the storm at eye level.
entries.technical_notes: A massive array of custom shapes maps cherry blossom textures via texture_sample, instanced as a dense particle system. The 3D camera perspective and wave-like displacement are modulated by the audio's bass and mid frequencies, creating an undulating floral landscape. A subtle reflection in the lower screen space is generated via composite shader feedback, blending previous frames with a low decay rate.

entries.name: Refik Fluid of Flora
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A slow horizontal current of botanical imagery suspended in a dark gallery void, with luminous warm accents catching the light.
entries.technical_notes: A custom texture sampler feeds a dense, gothic floral collage into the composite shader, where it is distorted by a slow, undulating per-pixel warp field. The warp is modulated by low-frequency audio bands, creating a gentle, liquid breathing effect across the tapestry of roses and lilies. High decay in the frame feedback loop maintains the crispness of the painterly details while allowing smooth, dreamlike transitions.

entries.name: Phat + Eo.S. - Data_swimmer
entries.author: Phat + Eo.S.
entries.technical_notes: A per-pixel warp shader creates a fluid, liquid-like advection field driven by the bass of the music. A custom wave renders a wireframe spiral sphere that deforms dynamically with the mid and treble frequencies. Feedback loops through sampler_main with a low decay rate produce persistent, painterly trails that blend the vibrant green and cyan palette into organic, marbled textures.

entries.name: Rovastar + Zylot - Narell's Fever
entries.author: Rovastar + Zylot
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave renders a high-frequency white oscilloscope driven by treble transients in the audio. The fluid background is generated by a per-pixel warp shader that creates liquid, reaction-diffusion-style swirls and fine contour ripples. Frame feedback through sampler_main with a low decay rate blends these elements into painterly, smoky trails that slowly rotate and cycle in hue.

entries.name: Rovastar & Unchained - Unified Drag 2 (Ghostly Vision Mix)
entries.author: Rovastar & Unchained
entries.technical_notes: A high-key, pastel composition driven by beat-gated bursts that trigger sudden color inversions and geometric shifts. Overlapping translucent planes are blended via frame feedback in sampler_main, while a persistent grid of motion vectors adds fine texture. The color palette cycles rapidly through bright, desaturated tones modulated by the audio's mid and treble frequencies.

entries.name: Origami Flock
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: Paper birds and butterflies drifting through a warm museum atrium, each one nodding to the music with its own tempo.
entries.technical_notes: A vast field of instanced custom shapes resembling origami cranes is distributed across a 3D terrain. High-frequency treble modulations drive the fluttering rotation of individual shapes, while the camera sweeps backward to reveal the scale of the particle system. The rendering relies on clean geometry passes without heavy frame feedback, maintaining sharp edges on a dark background.

entries.name: Reenen - phoenix
entries.author: Reenen
entries.technical_notes: Symmetrical custom waves are rendered as an intricate, gothic wireframe web that mirrors across the vertical axis. The central column acts as an audio-gated custom shape, pulsing with intense red and orange hues driven by the bass of the music. A high-frequency jitter in the fine lines reacts to treble transients, while a low decay rate in sampler_main maintains a delicate, ghostly persistence.

entries.name: Magnetosphere Revisited
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A modern take on Robert Hodgin's iTunes visualizer. Soft-light strands trail across the screen leaving glowing wakes, dramatic camera moves, bass-driven bloom on every drop.
entries.technical_notes: A dense array of custom shapes rendered as metallic, reflective spheres is animated along complex parametric paths. High-decay frame feedback through sampler_main generates persistent, worm-like chrome trails. The visual reacts to the music with dramatic zoom and rotation driven by bass-frequency peaks, eventually engulfing the screen in a chaotic, biomechanical web of specular highlights.

entries.name: Fairy Lights
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: Soft glowing orbs of light streaming across a dark canvas, leaving long persistent trails like a long-exposure photograph of moving lights.
entries.technical_notes: Custom shapes are instanced as glossy, multi-colored spheres that trace complex paths across the screen. A low decay rate in the feedback loop creates persistent, winding trails of these beaded structures that mimic physical threads. The entire system reacts dynamically to the audio, with bass hits triggering a massive expansion that fills the viewport with undulating waves of beads.

entries.name: Geiss - Cycloid 1 - painterly vortex
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: A dense, painterly feedback loop resembling sedimentary layers or feathers is generated via a low decay rate in sampler_main, creating persistent trails. Custom wave oscilloscopes slice diagonally across the frame, vibrating sharply in response to high-frequency transients in the music. The color palette cycles slowly through earthy ochres, deep reds, and olive greens, driven by a gradual hue rotation.

entries.name: Martin - extreme heat
entries.author: Martin
entries.blurb: Blazing thermal energy radiates and warps under audio pressure.
entries.technical_notes: A dramatic volcanic landscape is rendered using procedural FBM noise to generate turbulent, burning clouds in the sky. Discrete particle system bursts are triggered by beat detection on the bass, launching bright sparks that rain down with gravity-simulating equations. The lower half uses a coordinate-distorted reflection pass via sampler_main to simulate realistic water ripples reflecting the fiery sky and particle trails.

entries.name: Soap Bubbles
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: Iridescent soap bubbles rising and shimmering through soft afternoon light, gentle and contemplative.
entries.technical_notes: A dense custom wave resembling a microscopic cellular colony morphs and stretches across a dark void. A dramatic zoom transition, driven by the audio's bass energy, plunges the camera into the structure, scattering iridescent, bubble-like particles across the screen. Persistent trails are maintained via sampler_main feedback with low decay, while treble-driven specular highlights create a shimmering bloom_glow on the cell walls.

entries.name: Salmon Run
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: Silver salmon swimming upstream against a powerful current, the entire school holding formation while individual fish push through the flow.
entries.technical_notes: A 3D field of custom shapes configured as tiny star-like particles forms an undulating terrain. The vertical displacement of the grid is modulated by the audio's bass, while treble transients trigger shimmering brightness and scaling of individual elements. Subtle frame feedback via sampler_main preserves the trailing particles as the camera pans through the digital landscape.

entries.name: fiShbRaiN - the adventures of prismo jenkins
entries.author: fiShbRaiN
entries.technical_notes: A central glowing core undergoes dramatic beat-gated expansions, utilizing radial domain repetition to form kaleidoscopic geometric shells. High-frequency transients trigger intense bloom_glow flashes via the composite shader, while persistent particle systems spiral outward through a subtle warp field. Feedback loops in sampler_main maintain a soft, dusty trail of previous frames, blending organic noise with sharp geometric structures.

entries.name: Rovastar + Rocke - Sugar Spun Sister
entries.author: Rovastar + Rocke
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave draws high-frequency scribbles driven by the treble of the music, while a rotational warp field spirals the feedback buffer outward. Low decay in sampler_main allows the white waveforms to smear into elegant, swirling blue vortex arms. Beat detection on the bass triggers sudden zoom-in and zoom-out scaling pulses, creating a dramatic expansion and contraction cycle.

entries.name: Rovastar + Unchained - Ambrosia Mystic (Dark Heart Mix)
entries.author: Rovastar + Unchained
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave draws delicate, symmetric wireframe lines that react sharply to the treble of the music. The surrounding organic Rorschach patterns are generated via a per-pixel warp shader combined with frame feedback in sampler_main, modulated by a low decay rate. Beat-gated bursts trigger sudden palette shifts and radial expansions, driving the kaleidoscopic symmetry.

entries.name: Geiss - Casino

The background consists of horizontal topographic lines modulated by a per-pixel warp shader that simulates a fluid, undulating flow field. Frame feedback through sampler_main with a low decay rate creates a persistent trailing history of the central waveform as it drifts horizontally across the screen.

entries.name: Geiss - Cycloid 1 - painterly

Per-pixel warp equations distort the previous frame (sampled via sampler_main) into overlapping, scale-like structures resembling organic feathers or ink brushstrokes. A slow decay rate and low-frequency hue cycle shift the palette from slate grey to deep teal and eventually rich crimson.

entries.name: Martin - fata morgana

Custom waves are rendered as colorful, swirling trails that streak across the sky, with their scale and brightness modulated by the audio. The lower half of the screen uses a per-pixel warp shader to simulate water ripples, sampling sampler_main with a vertical reflection and distortion offset to create dynamic reflections of the sky elements.

Per-pixel warp equations create a fluid, swimming advection field, while a low decay rate in the frame feedback loop preserves the glowing trails. The brightness and density of the particle field modulate dynamically in response to the high-frequency treble and mid-range transients of the audio.

entries.name: Idiot - Star Of Annon

Discrete rectangular custom shapes are triggered as beat bursts by the audio's bass peaks, scaling rapidly outward before dissolving into the feedback loop.

entries.name: Geiss - Cauldron - painterly 3 (saturation remix)

entries.name: Geiss - Cycloid 1 - painterly vortex 3

Bass transients trigger sudden camera coordinate offsets and scale changes, sweeping the viewport through the accumulated feedback structures.

The per-pixel warp shader applies a complex radial distortion driven by bass attenuated, causing the entire field to expand and contract rhythmically.

The sphere's radius and noise deformation amplitude are modulated by the bass frequencies of the music, causing it to expand and pulse outward during kick events. The soft bloom on the rim suggests a composite shader utilizing a blur pyramid to create the glowing halo.

Frame feedback through sampler_main combined with a low decay rate and an upward-flowing per-pixel warp field generates smoky, flame-like trails. Intense bass hits in the music trigger bright yellow bloom bursts utilizing sampler_blur2 to create a high-energy core.

Frame feedback through sampler_main with high decay produces persistent, smoky trails of amber light.

entries.name: Eo.S. + Phat - chasers 11 sentinel C

The music's bass transients drive the rotation and spatial translation of the ribbon, while treble sparkles modulate the density and jitter of the individual wave points.

entries.technical_notes: A complex, tangled nest of oscillographic lines is generated via custom waves modulated by high-frequency transients in the synthetic test signal. The per-pixel warp shader drives dramatic zoom and rotation transitions triggered by the synthetic kick, while a low decay rate in sampler_main allows the white and colored trails to accumulate into dense, glowing structures before dispersing.

entries.name: Unchained - Free to Feel (Valium Remix)
entries.author: Unchained
entries.technical_notes: The preset exhibits rapid, aggressive state transitions driven by beat-gated audio triggers from the synthetic test signal. A central custom wave reacts dynamically to high-frequency transients, while a per-pixel warp shader combined with feedback through sampler_main generates dense vertical striations and blocky, hard-edged color fields. The extreme shifts in color mapping and geometric layout point to complex per-frame equations modulating texture coordinates and color registers on every detected beat.

entries.name: Unchained & Rovastar - Rainbow Obscura

A complex per-pixel warp shader divides the screen into a fractured, tiled grid that expands and shifts rapidly on bass-detected beat bursts. High-frequency chromatic split artifacts and feedback through sampler_main create a persistent, glitch-like digital trail.

entries.name: Unchained & Rovastar - Luckless

entries.technical_notes: A nested rectangular tunnel is generated via frame feedback using sampler_main with a high zoom factor and low decay. The warp field is modulated by the synthetic test signal's bass transients, causing sudden rotational and wave-like distortions. A central custom wave acts as an oscilloscope reacting to high-frequency treble in the test signal, while rapid hue cycling drives the dramatic palette shifts.

The decay rate is set to maximum, preventing any frame feedback or persistent trails in sampler_main. The synthetic test signal's bass transients drive the scale and complexity of the central oscilloscope-like scribble, while higher frequencies modulate its jitter.

High decay rate ensures instant frame-to-frame clearing with zero feedback trails or sampler_main persistence.

Chromatic split artifacts are visible at the boundaries of the geometric elements during peak audio thresholds.

entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave draws a complex, spirograph-like orbit that reacts to the treble and mid bands of the synthetic test signal. Frame feedback via sampler_main is configured with a high decay rate and radial zoom, creating a fading, directional trail that pulses outward during synthetic kicks. Subtle hue cycling shifts the monochrome trail through pale cyan and pink tones.

entries.name: Geiss - Flower Blossom
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: A central circular element is heavily gated by the bass of the synthetic test signal, triggering explosive expansions that decay into a tight, pulsing vortex. Per-pixel warp equations apply a radial zoom and pinch, drawing the frame feedback into the center. The soft, desaturated color shifts between dusty rose and pale teal are modulated by low-to-mid frequency bands, rendered with a high-exposure bloom pass.

entries.name: Geiss - Eye of Jupiter
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: Two horizontal custom waves render the raw audio waveform of the test signal against a near-total black void. A faint, low-frequency red glow in the bottom-left corner modulates with the bass of the test signal. The preset operates with high decay, causing the waveform lines to vanish instantly without leaving feedback trails.

entries.name: Geiss - Downward Spiral - color invert mirror x
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: A minimalist custom wave preset rendering a single horizontal ribbon against a black void. The wave's amplitude and vertical thickness are modulated directly by the low-frequency bands of the synthetic test signal. High decay rate ensures no persistent trails or frame feedback, leaving a stark, high-contrast oscilloscope aesthetic.

entries.name: Geiss - Cauldron - Tendrils (saturation remix)
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: A single custom_wave element is rendered as a rotating, audio-reactive vector against a pitch-black void. The wave's length and vertex displacement modulate dynamically with the bass and treble frequencies of the music. High decay rates prevent any frame feedback, leaving only the instantaneous state of the vector visible.

entries.name: Geiss - Eggs
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: A spherical warp field creates a prominent lens distortion that expands and contracts violently in response to bass transients in the music. Chaotic custom waves are drawn as high-contrast white lines, leaving short-lived trails in sampler_main due to a high decay rate. The composite shader applies a subtle chromatic split at high-luminance boundaries, accentuating the electric, high-voltage aesthetic.

entries.name: Tunnel of Images
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: A winding cylindrical tunnel wrapped in a deep-field nebula; bass drives flight speed.
entries.technical_notes: A central radial glow is rendered as a soft teal custom shape, heavily diffused using the blur pyramid (sampler_blur1). The brightness of the core modulates subtly in response to the bass frequencies of the music. High decay rates keep the surrounding field entirely dark, resulting in a minimalist, void-like presentation.

entries.name: Image Mosaic
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: Tessellated image tiles that pulse, scale, and offset on beats.
entries.technical_notes: A structured grid of repeating blocks is modulated by a per-pixel warp shader, creating a domain repetition effect where cell corners pinch into sharp teal and brown star-like shapes. The overall brightness and scale of the grid are heavily gated by the bass frequencies of the music, causing the pattern to collapse into a dark, flat mosaic during quiet passages and expand during peak transients. The rendering relies on a custom composition shader that masks and sharpens the grid boundaries based on audio-driven variables.

entries.name: Raymarch Sphere
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: Mandelbox-fold sphere SDF with cyan rim light; mid-band audio modulates iteration.
entries.technical_notes: A raymarched signed distance field (SDF) utilizes spatial domain repetition to create a tiled grid of geometric, capsule-like columns in the style of Inigo Quilez. The camera's forward translation and shape morphing are driven by the music, while a sudden full-frame flash indicates a beat-gated threshold trigger. Shading is computed via a custom cosine palette with clean diffuse lighting.

entries.name: Audio Spectrum
entries.author: prism
entries.blurb: 64 mirrored FFT bars, cyan→orange gradient with soft bloom.
entries.technical_notes: A pixelated horizontal custom wave is rendered with a dual-color gradient transitioning from a cyan core to an orange fringe. A vertical blur pass, likely utilizing a 1D blur in the composite shader, creates a soft glowing pillar effect behind the waveform. The vertical displacement and amplitude of the wave are directly modulated by the low and mid-frequency bands of the music.

entries.name: Flexi - using jedi forces
entries.author: Flexi
entries.technical_notes: A custom wave rendered as a sharp black triangle on the left edge of the screen reacts dynamically to the music, with its jagged, comb-like vertices modulating in response to high-frequency transients. A digital warp field creates a subtle vertical grid-like texture in the red background, while frame feedback through sampler_main preserves transient diagonal slash lines triggered by the kick.

entries.name: Flexi - layered + Boz - Buckwild
entries.author: Flexi
entries.technical_notes: The visualizer remains entirely black until triggered by transient peaks in the music, which gate full-screen color flashes. This high-threshold audio gating produces a stark, strobe-like effect with zero decay trail, returning instantly to a dark void state.

entries.name: Flexi - hue burst
entries.author: Flexi
entries.technical_notes: A single custom wave configured as a circular waveform is rendered against a stark black background. The wave's radius and vertex displacement react sharply to the bass frequencies of the music, while sudden position jumps are gated to the kick. The lack of frame feedback (sampler_main is not blended) results in a clean, trail-free geometric presentation.

entries.name: Esotic & Rozzor - Pixie Party Light ((No Wave Invasion) Mandala Chill Red Yellow Mix)
entries.author: Esotic & Rozzor
entries.technical_notes: A highly symmetric geometric tunnel is generated using radial domain repetition and feedback loops. The kick in the test signal triggers dramatic, instantaneous palette shifts between bright yellow and deep red-orange, likely driven by beat-gated state variables in the composite shader. Fine wireframe lines overlaying the structure flicker dynamically with high-frequency treble transients, while per-vertex zoom equations maintain a rapid forward-marching motion.

entries.name: Eo.S.+Phat - spectrum bubble new colors_v2
entries.author: Eo.S.+Phat
entries.technical_notes: A deep concentric spiral tunnel is generated via a feedback loop utilizing sampler_main with a zoom factor slightly greater than unity and a small rotational warp. The metallic sheen is modulated by a cosine palette mapping that shifts between deep slate blues and bronze golds in response to the music's bass kicks. The overall structure resembles a classic Geiss feedback-tunnel lineage with high decay creating a clean, non-persistent edge.

entries.name: Eo.S. and Zylot - skylight (Stained Glass Majesty mix)
entries.author: Eo.S. and Zylot
entries.technical_notes: A logarithmic spiral warp field drives frame feedback through sampler_main to construct a deep, repeating tunnel. The preset undergoes dramatic audio-gated inversions triggered by the kick, transitioning from a dark textured cavern to a high-contrast white field. Intricate custom waves are radially duplicated and modulated by treble frequencies to form the sharp, geometric spiral arms.

entries.name: Eo.S. - skylight a1 [music warp switch]
entries.author: Eo.S.
entries.technical_notes: A logarithmic spiral warp field transforms custom wave inputs into an intricate, recursive geometric fractal. Frame feedback through sampler_main with a high zoom factor creates infinite nesting, while the music's bass transients modulate the rotation speed and trigger bright bloom_glow flashes. The color palette cycles through a wide spectrum, shifting from muted lavender to vibrant cyan and green.

entries.name: Eo.S. - sarc c_Phats Zoom Mix
entries.author: Eo.S.
entries.technical_notes: A central nested triangle custom shape with an amber core pulses dynamically to the bass of the music. Spiraling rings of circles are rendered via custom waves that rotate and scale through space, while a radial bloom effect is achieved by blending the current frame with a blurred feedback sampler. Low decay in sampler_main maintains clean, sharp geometric lines with minimal trailing artifacts.

entries.author: Eo.S.

High-frequency elements of the music drive the visibility of custom waves rendered as dotted neon paths, while a high decay rate ensures snappy frame-to-frame transitions without persistent trails. State-switching logic driven by the kick gates rapid transitions between distinct geometric configurations and color palettes.

entries.name: martin + flexi - bombyx mori mix2 in the beehive
entries.author: martin + flexi
entries.technical_notes: A minimalist custom shape rendering a simple circular radar sweep. The wedge rotates at a constant rate with no apparent response to the audio, set against a solid black background. Likely driven by basic time-based per-frame equations.

entries.name: martin + stahlregen - martin in da mash 10 (infinity mix)
entries.author: martin + stahlregen
entries.technical_notes: A single horizontal custom_wave renders the audio waveform against a completely black background. With no frame feedback or warp field active, the preset exhibits zero persistence, relying entirely on the instantaneous state of the test signal. High-frequency transients cause the purple wave to fragment into dashed segments.

entries.name: martin - soma in pink
entries.author: martin
entries.technical_notes: A single horizontal custom wave acts as a minimalist oscilloscope, rendering the raw audio waveform directly against a solid black background. The purple line exhibits high-frequency ripples corresponding to treble transients in the audio loop, with no frame feedback or warp field applied. The rendering is extremely stark and snappy, with a high decay rate that prevents any persistent trails.

entries.name: martin - disco mix 4
entries.author: martin
entries.technical_notes: A single horizontal custom_wave is rendered as an undulating 3D ribbon against a stark black void. The high decay rate prevents any persistent frame feedback in sampler_main, keeping the background completely dark. The ribbon's deformation and vertical displacement react directly to the mid and treble frequencies of the synthetic test signal.

entries.name: martin - gate to moria
entries.author: martin
entries.technical_notes: A single custom wave is rendered as a filled ribbon in the center of the screen, directly plotting the audio waveform. The absence of frame feedback through sampler_main or decay trails leaves a stark, isolated shape against a pure black background. The wave's vertical displacement and jagged geometry react dynamically to the mid and treble frequencies of the audio.

entries.name: Geiss - Cosmic Dust 2 - quasistatic noise desat trails
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: A stark, high-contrast geometric composition where large rectangular custom shapes flash and shift position in direct response to the audio. Beat-gated triggers drive sudden color state changes between solid white, vibrant magenta, and cyan, while a high decay rate ensures snappy, near-instantaneous transitions. Subtle chromatic split fringing appears at the boundaries of the shapes during peak transients.

entries.name: shifter - urchin mod
entries.author: shifter
entries.technical_notes: A 4-way kaleidoscopic domain repetition creates a highly symmetric, pulsating tunnel. Per-pixel warp equations apply high-frequency jagged oscillations driven by the mid and treble frequencies of the test signal. Frame feedback via sampler_main blends with high zoom, while custom waves generate sharp radial spokes that flare outward on bass-gated triggers.

entries.name: shifter - spills blender + krash beatdetect - mash0000 - here comb your hair with this planet
entries.author: shifter
entries.technical_notes: Bilateral symmetry and custom wave rings frame a central feedback tunnel sampled via sampler_main. High audio gating driven by the synthetic test signal's bass transients triggers sudden expansions of the warp field and shape scales, which quickly fade due to a high decay rate. The central organic textures evoke Geiss's classic reaction-diffusion cauldron lineage.

entries.name: shifter - neon pulse (reactive)
entries.author: shifter
entries.technical_notes: A complex per-pixel warp shader drives spiraling, fern-like organic structures, utilizing frame feedback via sampler_main with a moderate decay rate to generate persistent trails. High-amplitude transients in the synthetic test signal trigger rapid hue rotation and sudden expansions of the warp field, while treble spikes modulate the brightness of high-frequency neon filaments. The composite pass utilizes sampler_blur1 to yield a soft glow around the sharp, reactive filaments.

entries.name: Unchained - Unified Drag 2
entries.author: Unchained
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave scribble reacts dynamically to treble in the synthetic test signal. Strong zoom and rotation in the per-frame equations feed into sampler_main, generating a persistent concentric tunnel structure. Beat-gated triggers on the synthetic kick drive rapid hue cycling and high-contrast white-out flashes that decay quickly.

entries.name: Unchained - Cranked On Failure
entries.author: Unchained
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave draws high-frequency scribbles that spiral outward via a rotational warp field. Nested rectangular borders are generated dynamically, scaling and flashing in response to bass transients in the synthetic test signal. Frame feedback through sampler_main with moderate decay preserves the sharp geometric lines, creating a chaotic, strobing tunnel effect.

entries.name: Unchained - All You Can Eat
entries.author: Unchained
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave draws a chaotic, high-frequency white scribble that reacts to the treble of the test signal. High-frequency feedback through sampler_main combined with a low decay rate produces a dense, scratchy matrix of persistent trails. The warp field is heavily modulated by the synthetic kick, triggering rapid zoom bursts and radial distortions.

entries.name: Rozzor & StudioMusic - Vertigyny (Geiss Shape Mod)
entries.author: Rozzor & StudioMusic
entries.technical_notes: Per-pixel warp shader creates a dynamic spiral and zoom effect, while feedback through sampler_main with high decay rates produces sharp, geometric trails. A central custom wave reacts directly to the treble of the test signal, while sudden palette shifts and geometry rotations are gated by bass-attenuated beat detection. Moiré-like interference patterns emerge from high-frequency coordinate manipulation in the composite shader.

entries.name: Rovastar - VooV's Movement (After Dark Mix)
entries.author: Rovastar
entries.technical_notes: Per-pixel warp shader creates a complex fluid advection field resembling reaction-diffusion, driven by a low decay rate in sampler_main to produce persistent, swirling trails. A central custom_wave acts as an oscilloscope, reacting dynamically to the treble and mid-range frequencies of the synthetic test signal. The global color palette undergoes a continuous hue_cycle, transitioning from deep blues and purples to vibrant magentas and warm ochres.

entries.name: Rovastar - VooV's Movement (After Dark Mix) - Painterly
entries.author: Rovastar
entries.technical_notes: Two horizontal custom_wave elements display high-frequency audio waveforms across the center, shifting in color via a continuous hue_cycle. The background utilizes a fluid per-pixel warp_field combined with a low decay rate in sampler_main feedback to create a painterly, organic texture reminiscent of Geiss's reaction-diffusion lineage. The warp dynamics and zoom are modulated by the bass attenuated from the synthetic test signal, while the wave spikes trace the treble.

entries.name: Rovastar - Fractopia (Upspoken Mix)_Phat_Speak_When_Spoken_2
entries.author: Rovastar
entries.technical_notes: Per-pixel warp shader creates a swirling, organic reaction-diffusion tunnel, sampling previous frames via sampler_main with high zoom and rotation. Custom waves form a central wireframe core that reacts dynamically to the treble of the test signal. Intense audio gating on the synthetic kick triggers instant palette shifts and zoom bursts, while sampler_blur1 softens the boundaries to produce a glowing, cell-like texture.

entries.name: Rovastar - Fractopia (Upspoken Mix)
entries.author: Rovastar
entries.technical_notes: A recursive scalloped tunnel is generated via zoom and rotation feedback loops sampled through sampler_main. High-contrast thresholding and edge detection in the composite shader render bold, comic-book-style black outlines over flat color fields. Rapid palette swaps and geometric state jumps are heavily driven by audio gating, reacting dynamically to the synthetic kick and transients within the test signal.

entries.name: ORB - Nova Sunrise
entries.author: ORB
entries.technical_notes: A central custom shape with radial domain repetition scales and rotates dynamically in response to the synthetic test signal. High decay rate prevents any frame feedback or trails, leaving a clean, flat-shaded silhouette against a solid black background. Discrete color shifts and rotation steps are gated directly by bass and mid-frequency thresholds.

entries.name: ORB - Fire and Fumes 2
entries.author: ORB
entries.technical_notes: Overlapping custom shapes and sharp custom waves are rendered with intense additive bloom_glow, driven by beat detection on the synthetic test signal to trigger full-screen whiteout flashes. A rapid hue_cycle rotates the color palette through highly saturated primaries, while frame feedback via sampler_main maintains a persistent trail of geometric layers. The per-pixel warp shader introduces a subtle radial zoom and edge distortion that modulates with treble transients.

entries.name: ORB - Blue Emotion
entries.author: ORB
entries.technical_notes: A grid-based domain repetition shader tiles the screen, feeding the previous frame back into itself via sampler_main to create a recursive, nested fractal pattern. Concentric circular masks scale dynamically in response to the bass of the synthetic test signal. Rapid hue cycling shifts the entire palette through vibrant primary and secondary colors on treble transients.

entries.name: Mstress & Zylot - Acid UFO
entries.author: Mstress & Zylot
entries.technical_notes: A spiraling tunnel of nested rectangular frames is generated via frame feedback in sampler_main with high zoom and rotation. A bright white custom wave in the center tracks the treble of the synthetic test signal. Intense beat-gated triggers driven by the synthetic kick cause sudden color inversions, flashing rectangular blocks, and rapid hue cycling.

entries.name: Ishan - Anuera
entries.author: Ishan
entries.technical_notes: The preset alternates between a blocky, tiled geometric state and a fluidly warped ring state, triggered by beat detection on the synthetic kick. Custom waves render as thin, high-frequency scribbles that react to the treble of the synthetic test signal. A per-pixel warp shader applies a rotational and radial distortion, blending with previous frames via sampler_main to create smooth, decaying trails.

entries.name: Idiot24-7 - Ascending to heaven 2
entries.author: Idiot24-7
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave oscillates rapidly in response to treble transients in the test signal, surrounded by concentric elliptical custom shapes that cycle in hue. A radial warp field combined with frame feedback via sampler_main generates the streaking background rays. High-amplitude bass kicks trigger sudden full-screen strobes and color inversions, while sampler_blur1 softens the high-frequency vector lines into a luminous bloom.

entries.name: Geiss - Planar Travel
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: A minimalist custom wave is rendered as a stark, thin line across a black void. The wave's vertical displacement and slight geometric splitting react to the frequency bands of the test signal. A high decay rate in the frame feedback loop prevents any persistent trails, maintaining a clean, sharp vector aesthetic while the line's color cycles over time.

entries.name: Geiss - Motion Blur 2 (color sat boost)
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: Multiple custom wave formulas render horizontal ribbon-like structures that oscillate dynamically. The amplitude and vertical displacement of these ribbons are modulated by the mid and treble bands of the synthetic test signal, while the synthetic kick triggers sudden multiplication of the active wave instances. A rapid hue cycle rotates the color palette across the spectrum against a clean, high-decay dark background.

entries.name: Geiss - Mash-Up 4
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: A highly minimalist preset consisting of a solid purple background with a single diagonal custom wave acting as an oscilloscope. The wave reacts to the transients of the synthetic test signal, occasionally rendering as a thin dark or orange line before disappearing back into the background. The decay rate is extremely high, leaving no persistent trails.

entries.name: Geiss - Electric Storm Half-Digital 2
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: A minimalist, dark preset consisting of a single custom_wave oscilloscope line and a static diagonal vector on a black background. The horizontal wave's amplitude and ripple modulate in response to the mid-range frequencies of the test signal, while the hue cycles slowly through purple, blue, cyan, and white. The lack of frame_feedback or warp_field results in zero persistent trails, creating a clean, sparse aesthetic.

entries.name: Geiss - Electric Storm Half-Digital 2 (Fiesta Mix)
entries.author: Geiss
entries.technical_notes: A minimalist custom_wave renders a thin horizontal oscilloscope line and a sharp diagonal wedge against a pure black background. The wave's vertical displacement is gated by the mid and treble frequencies of the synthetic test signal. With no frame feedback and an instantaneous decay, the visual remains extremely sparse while hue_cycle slowly rotates the line's color.

entries.name: Flexi - self-lubricating
entries.author: Flexi
entries.technical_notes: A minimalist, high-contrast preset where custom shapes are rendered as flat magenta polygons against a solid black background. The visibility and geometry of these shapes are gated directly by the bass threshold of the music, resulting in a stark stroboscopic effect. No frame feedback or warp shaders are active, leaving only raw, instantaneous state changes.

entries.name: Flexi + Martin - cascading decay swing
entries.author: Flexi + Martin
entries.technical_notes: The preset displays solid, full-screen color fills that instantly switch on detected beats from the music. There are no spatial warp fields, custom waves, or feedback samplers active, resulting in a completely flat, minimalist strobe effect. The color transitions are driven by audio gating on the bass threshold, cycling through a wide gamut of highly saturated hues.

entries.name: Eo.S.+Phat Emergent factors - Bitcore Tweak
entries.author: Eo.S.+Phat Emergent factors
entries.technical_notes: A complex recursive grid structure is animated via a per-pixel warp shader that drives spiral zooming and rotation. The music's bass kicks trigger rapid state transitions, gating the color palette through distinct phases of deep blue, bright cyan, and intense magenta. Fine line structures and high-frequency grid subdivisions modulate dynamically with treble sparkle.

entries.name: Eo.S.+Phat - Flare_dig_mix
entries.author: Eo.S.+Phat
entries.technical_notes: Bilateral symmetry is enforced across the central vertical axis, creating a mirrored organic structure. The central core features a high-frequency grid pattern modulated by the music's mid-range, while the outer red and purple wing-like structures flare outward on the kick. Frame feedback through sampler_main with a moderate decay rate preserves these wispy, feathered trails across frames.

entries.name: Eo.S. - pulsecube f demon - mash0000 - yakuza gut cake
entries.author: Eo.S.
entries.technical_notes: A persistent left-aligned triangular custom wave features a high-frequency comb modulation on its trailing edge, driven by treble spikes in the music. Sweeping geometric arcs and hourglass custom shapes are scaled, rotated, and colored via per-frame equations mapped to bass attenuated. A high decay rate in sampler_main maintains high contrast against a dark background, while subtle vertical coordinate stretching in the warp shader creates faint vertical feedback trails.

entries.name: Eo.S. - heater core C_Phat's_class + sparks_mix
entries.author: Eo.S.
entries.technical_notes: Multiple custom waves, including a diagonal oscilloscope and a central spiraling ring structure, are driven directly by the music. A radial warp field combined with high decay creates fast-zooming feedback trails through sampler_main. Intense beat detection on the kick triggers full-screen magenta flashes and shifts the warp scale dynamically.

entries.name: Eo.S. - glowsticks v2 05 and proton lights (+Krash's beat code) _Phat_remix07
entries.author: Eo.S.
entries.technical_notes: Custom wave ribbons representing 'glowsticks' are rendered and replicated across a bilateral symmetry plane. The music's bass transients trigger sudden scale jumps and rapid hue cycling via beat-gated equations. Feedback trails in sampler_main are tightly controlled with a high decay rate, leaving sharp, geometric remnants of previous frames that dissolve quickly.

entries.name: Eo.S. - glowsticks v2 05 and proton lights (+Krash's beat code) _Phat_remix02b
entries.author: Eo.S.
entries.technical_notes: Parametric ribbon structures are generated via custom waves modulated by audio-driven registers q1-q8, leaving persistent trails through a low decay rate in sampler_main. Beat-gated triggers from the kick drive rapid camera zoom resets and coordinate transformations, creating a highly kinetic pulsing effect. A background grid pattern is rendered dynamically, flickering in response to high-frequency transients in the test signal.

entries.name: Eo.S. + Zylot - skylight (Stained Glass Majesty mix)
entries.author: Eo.S. + Zylot
entries.technical_notes: A logarithmic spiral warp field drives a rapid zoom and rotation feedback loop via sampler_main. Sharp, needle-like custom waves trace geometric stained-glass facets that shatter and reform in response to treble transients in the music. High-frequency beat-gated triggers invert the color palette, shifting the render from deep saturated blues and yellows to a high-contrast, high-key white and magenta aesthetic.

entries.name: Eo.S. + Phat - Emergent factors
entries.author: Eo.S. + Phat
entries.technical_notes: A complex kaleidoscopic domain repetition is driven by a per-pixel warp field reacting to the music's bass kicks. Custom waves form dense wireframe heptagons and circles that scale and rotate dynamically. Rapid hue cycling rotates the palette through deep blues, greens, and magentas, while frame feedback through sampler_main preserves the structural lines.

entries.name: Bmelgren - Pentultimate Nerual Slipstream (Tweak 2)
entries.author: Bmelgren
entries.technical_notes: A radial slipstream tunnel is generated using a per-pixel warp shader that combines zoom and rotation, creating a feedback loop via sampler_main. High-amplitude bass transients in the music trigger dramatic beat bursts that expand the central core and saturate the frame with additive bloom. Treble-reactive custom waves draw thin, chaotic white lines and grid structures over the cycling hue palette.

entries.name: Aderrasi - What cannot be
entries.author: Aderrasi
entries.technical_notes: A complex custom_wave draws a chaotic, scribbled oscilloscope driven by the music's mid and treble bands. Per-pixel warp equations apply a radial zoom and subtle rotation, feeding back previous frames through sampler_main with a moderate decay rate to create persistent, painterly trails. The background color undergoes a rapid hue_cycle, modulated by treble energy.

entries.name: Aderrasi - Kevlar Tunnel
entries.author: Aderrasi
entries.technical_notes: A nested, spiraling tunnel of rectangular outlines is generated via frame feedback using sampler_main with a zoom and rotation transform. A complex custom_wave in the center acts as a high-frequency oscilloscope, jittering rapidly in response to treble transients in the music. Continuous hue cycling rotates the background palette across the spectrum, while bass hits modulate the scale and twist of the tunnel structure.

entries.name: Aderrasi - Kevlar Ore Deposit
entries.author: Aderrasi
entries.technical_notes: A spiral warp field combined with frame feedback through sampler_main creates a ribbed, cavernous tunnel that zooms inward. A central custom_wave reacts to the music's treble frequencies, drawing chaotic white scribbles that are pulled into the feedback vortex. The color palette undergoes continuous hue cycling, shifting from deep purples to earthy ochres and greens.

entries.name: Aderrasi - Kevlar Abyss
entries.author: Aderrasi
entries.technical_notes: A central custom wave draws a chaotic scribble that jitters in response to the treble of the music. A complex warp field with high zoom and rotation feedback through sampler_main transforms these lines into a spiraling, nested wireframe tunnel. The color palette undergoes continuous hue cycling, shifting the entire structure through vibrant neon states.

entries.name: Aderrasi - Curse of the Mirror Emu
entries.author: Aderrasi
entries.technical_notes: A complex per-pixel warp shader applies a highly turbulent, mirrored advection field driven by the music's bass and mid frequencies. Frame feedback through sampler_main with a low decay rate creates persistent, bleeding fluid trails that are continuously folded by bilateral symmetry. The composite pass utilizes a high-contrast color mapping that cycles rapidly, resulting in intense chromatic shifts during transient peaks in the test signal.
